extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won a reduced bunch sprint after GC teams rode tempo all day to prevent crosswind splits, beating WOUT VAN AERT by half a wheel.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma placed GC leader Vingegaard in active chase when breakaway companion Teunissen abandoned, revealing nervous leadership protection.
GC teams (not sprint trains) controlled finale due to crosswind threat, leaving shortened leadouts that favored positioning over pure speed.
Wout van Aert racing for stage despite holding green jersey commanding lead suggests team prioritizing morale over energy conservation.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: crashed but remounted quickly; team lost Kuss and Kruijswijk same stage, significantly weakening Pyrenees support
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: contested sprint finish despite already controlling green by huge margin, showing exceptional form and confidence
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: distanced on minor classified climb, signaling form deficit versus top sprinters heading into final week
rider_signals.CHRISTOPHE Alexander: negative: struggling just to hold contact on minor climbs, indicating Cofidis may lack sprint delivery capacity
rider_signals.THOMAS Benjamin: neutral: Cofidis gave local rider 500m solo flyer for exposure despite 14-year stage drought, tactical charity gift
